title: boehmeria australis subsp. dealbata
intro: Boehmeria australis subsp. dealbata is a subspecies of Boehmeria australis, a type of nettle-like plant native to the tropical regions of the Pacific Islands, including Fiji. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, with its leaves and stems being used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Boehmeria australis subsp. dealbata include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and combat infections. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve making a tea from its leaves and stems, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
